calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order To Apportion And Distribute Funds
Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Amir Sarreshtehdary of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Judith Mendes-Cates, as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful death Heir of Jerry Cates, Sr., Deceased; and Jerry Leon Cates, Jr., James Cates, Kristen Cates-Frankfort, Destiny Stayner, Roxanne Cottrill as Wrongful Death Heirs of Jerry Cates, Sr., Deceased
Plaintiffs Judith Mendes-Cates also appeared in person.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER TO APPORTION AND DISTRIBUTE FUNDS

Hearing held and the Court ruled on Plaintiffs' motion for order to apportion and distribute funds in the following proportion:
Judith Mendes-Cates 40%
Jerry Leon Cates, Jr. 15%
James Cates 15%
Kristen Cates-Frankfort 15%
Destiny Stayner 5%
Roxanne Cottrill 5%
Trevor Cottrill 5%
Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Sandy Lee of AIKEN WELCH, CSR 971 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)
